title: fraxinus oxycarpa f. stipitata
intro: Fraxinus oxycarpa f. stipitata, also known as the variegated Manchurian ash, is a deciduous tree native to East Asia that belongs to the Oleaceae family. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus oxycarpa f. stipitata include its ability to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory and cardiovascular disorders. Fraxinus oxycarpa f. stipitata is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of East Asia.
